tasks.title: Update ws.rs for session routing
tasks.description: Update server/src/routes/ws.rs to handle session-specific WebSocket routing
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify WebSocket connects to correct session path
AddRegressionTest: ensure ws.rs compiles with session routing
tasks.impl_notes: Added PathParams struct to extract session_id from path. Updated ws_index to accept web::Query<PathParams>. Routes now support both /api/ws/{session_id} and /api/ws?session_id=xxx. Added SessionHub registration on connect and unregistration on disconnect. Integrated hub_receiver into the event loop to receive broadcast messages. Updated ServerState in lib.rs to include session_hub field. Fixed all test files to include session_hub.

tasks.title: Integrate execute with session hub

tasks.title: Add multiple client support per session
tasks.description: Add multiple client support per session using Arc<RwLock> in session hub
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify multiple clients can connect to same session
AddIntegrationTest: verify all clients receive same events
tasks.impl_notes: IMPLEMENTED. SessionHub uses Arc<RwLock<HashMap<String, SessionClients>>> with SessionClients containing HashMap<String, broadcast::Sender<StreamMessage>>. Tests pass: test_ws_lifecycle_multiple_clients_setup_teardown and test_execute_events_broadcast_to_multiple_clients both verify multiple clients can connect and receive same events.
